steps.t: Thandor, the Gondorian Captain, can be located in the market east of Tol Ciryarani. You should speak with Thandor.
The eastern river-gate can be found on the east side of the city. You should investigate the river-gate.
The stray note can be found near the eastern river-gate of Pelargir. You should bring the note to Thandor.
Thandor, the Gondorian Captain, can be located in the market east of Tol Ciryarani. You should speak with Thandor.
